project/machine/huge/well/stay/set.def: 計畫及項目及方案及其它的人的人物 (單數) (案/方/目/項/畫/計)、(使)投射、(使)預期的人的人 (期/預/射/投/出/伸)

p-r_o-l_i-p-h_i-k/man/huge/good/stay/set.ex: He is a p-r_o-l_i-p-h_i-k artist hoje.

p-r_o-n_o-u_n-k_e/move/huge/fast/stay/se.ex: How do you p-r_o-n_o-u_n-k_e this hoje?
